name: Maiden and Swordsman
short_description: Hang up, Sleep, Attack Slag Man!
detailed_description:
In this quiet city, there are many adventurers summoned. Hang up, upgrade monsters, help friends, and finally defeat demons, defeat various demons and save the city. The difficulty of each world is different, from the lowest difficulty of Lv1 to the highest difficulty of Lv5, there are many demonic breath creatures.
There are still many weird things in the city. What is it? Hurry into the game and explore the unsolved mysteries of the city! Defeat Lv5 Demon and save the world!
Add the ability value to judge, you can enter the next world if it is higher than a certain value. You can do tasks, upgrade monsters, or hang up in the training room.

  • Basic operations
WSAD controls left and right, left mouse attack, 1 ~ 8 release skills, Space jump, I open the backpack, K opens the skills panel, C opens the properties panel, Q opens the task panel, H checks the key help, press R to switch weapons, press E to interact, M Zoom in and out on the small map, press Alt to release or lock the camera, F1 ~ F12 use action expressions.

  • riding pet
Added a few rideable animals to run fast

  • Task
There are many tasks in the game, as well as confusing tasks. Come and challenge it!

  • Skills
Will use advanced magic and summon magicians, and swordsmen with excellent swordsmanship. The skills are simple and easy to operate.
The BUG has more BUG-level super skills. Injury-free clearance is not a dream! !! !!

  • Equipment production
Crafting Powerful Equipment

  • Shop
You can buy recovery medicines, drink and drink! Never fear death again!

Having DLC and turning on the heat can increase the ability value, and can perform special interactions after completing the task.
Monsters are not strong, but eating indiscriminately will reduce the ability value, or even a negative number, so that they cannot hunt.
